device_name: Xeleris V Processing and Review Systems
intended_use: The system is intended for use by Nuclear Medicine (NM) or Radiology practitioners and referring physicians for display, processing, archiving, printing, reporting and networking of NMI data, includin
intended_use_full: The system is intended for use by Nuclear Medicine (NM) or Radiology practitioners and referring physicians for display, processing, archiving, printing, reporting and networking of NMI data, including planar scans (Static, Whole Body, Dynamic, Multi-Gated) and tomographic scans (SPECT, Gated SPECT, dedicated PET or Camera-Based-PET) acquired by gamma cameras or PET scanners.
target_condition: Multiple conditions: Parkinson disease (via DaTscan), Pulmonary Embolism, COPD, emphysema, epileptic seizures, dementia (Alzheimer's, Lewy body, Parkinson's disease dementia, vascular dementia, frontotemporal dementia), brain inflammation, brain death, acute stroke, chronic and acute ischemia, traumatic brain injury, coronary artery disease, bone metastases from prostate cancer, liver pathology requiring SIRT treatment
ground_truth: Representative clinical exams manually segmented by experienced NM Physicists and Physicians
other_metrics: Algorithm evaluation using 5-point Likert scale scoring by NM Physicists and Physicians on segmentation results for DL-based kidney segmentation and lung fissure segmentation algorithms
